mapper.select: SELECT id,order_id,user_id,client_request_id,old_total_amount,new_total_amount,price_difference,change_fee,reason,status FROM connecting_change_record WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND client_request_id=#{clientRequestId}

SELECT id,order_id,user_id,client_request_id,old_total_amount,new_total_amount,price_difference,change_fee,reason,status FROM connecting_change_record WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND client_request_id=#{clientRequestId}
SELECT id,order_id,user_id,client_request_id,old_total_amount,new_total_amount,price_difference,change_fee,reason,status FROM connecting_change_record WHERE order_id=#{orderId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO connecting_change_segment(change_record_id,snapshot_type,segment_no,flight_id,flight_no, departure_airport_code,arrival_airport_code,departure_time,arrival_time,passenger_seats) SELECT #{changeRecordId},#{snapshotType},s.segment_no,s.flight_id,s.flight_no,s.departure_airport_code, s.arrival_airport_code,s.departure_time,s.arrival_time, JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('passengerId',p.passenger_id,'passengerName',p.passenger_name, 'seatId',p.seat_id,'seatNo',p.seat_no,'ticketPrice',p.ticket_price)) FROM ticket_order_segment s JOIN order_segment_passenger p ON p.order_segment_id=s.id WHERE s.order_id=#{orderId} GROUP BY s.id,s.segment_no,s.flight_id,s.flight_no,s.departure_airport_code,s.arrival_airport_code,s.departure_time,s.arrival_time
